nodalDepartmentName.label: Department Of Woman Empowerment & Child Development

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme "Mukhyamantri Anchal Amrit Yojana" has been launched by the Department of Women Empowerment & Child Development, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to improve the health of children between 3 to 6 years of age by providing them fortified and flavored milk containing Vitamins A and D, four days a week, at Anganwadi Centres.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Under this scheme, children between 3 to 6 years of age are provided fortified and flavored milk enriched with Vitamins A and D, four days a week.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to improve the health of children between 3 to 6 years of age by providing them fortified and flavored milk containing Vitamins A and D, four days a week, at Anganwadi Centres.

children.text: The scheme "Mukhyamantri Anchal Amrit Yojana" has been launched by the Department of Women Empowerment & Child Development, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to improve the health of children between 3 to 6 years of age by providing them fortified and flavored milk containing Vitamins A and D, four days a week, at Anganwadi Centres.
Under this scheme, children between 3 to 6 years of age are provided fortified and flavored milk enriched with Vitamins A and D, four days a week.
Children who go to/are registered at the Anganwadi Centre receive benefits directly at the centre.

applicationProcess.process_md: Children who go to/are registered at the Anganwadi Centre receive benefits directly at the centre.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The beneficiary must be a resident of Uttarakhand. 1. The beneficiary must be a child between 3 and 6 years of age.

children.text: The beneficiary must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
The beneficiary must be a child between 3 and 6 years of age.
